message:
fix(polyfills): fix SHA384/SHA512 hash buffer and randomBytes Buffer lookup

- crypto.zig: Increase hash_buffer from 64 to 128 bytes for hex output
  SHA512 produces 64 bytes binary = 128 hex chars, SHA384 = 96 hex chars
  Old buffer was only 64 bytes causing "Hash too large" error

- crypto.js: Lookup Buffer at call time in randomBytes() wrapper
  Buffer may not be defined when crypto module initializes due to module
  load order. Previously captured undefined Buffer in closure.
